scenario: As a recent buyer of their car, write an E-mail to the Manager of XYZ Automotive Company, Mr. Kishore, regarding the poor quality of service facilities available in the city. Sign the E-mail as Anil.
Write an email to the Operations Head, Ms. Shreya, complaining about the recurrent delays in the delivery of critical items to your office. Sign off as Rajesh.
Write an email to the Customer Support Lead of GadgetVerse, Mr. Rohit, reporting a defective laptop delivered to you and asking for a replacement. Sign as Neha.
Write an email to your ISP Hub Manager, Mr. Vinay, regarding an internet outage in your locality that has disrupted remote work. Sign as Sameer.
Write an email to the Hostel Warden, Mr. Prasad, expressing deep concern over the sub-standard food and sanitation issues in the girls' block. Sign as Priya.
Write an email to the Branch Manager of National Trust Bank, Mr. Deshmukh, regarding unauthorized credit card charges. Sign as Vikram.
Write an email to the Principal of ABC Institute, Dr. Roy, regarding outdated computer laboratories and lack of resources. Sign as Kiran.
Write an email to the Scholarship Committee Chairperson, Dr. Mehta, asking for details on the delay of your academic scholarship disbursal. Sign as Amit.
Write an email to the Store Owner, Mr. Bansal, demanding a replacement or a complete refund for a broken refrigerator delivered to your flat. Sign as Sunita.
Write an email to the Transport In-Charge, Mr. Khan, regarding the irregular timings and unsafe driving of college bus route 14. Sign as Rahul.
Write an email to the HR Manager of Apex Solutions, Ms. Kapoor, requesting a one-week medical extension for your joining date due to a fracture. Sign as Nitin.
Write an email to the Project Director, Dr. Anand, requesting additional cloud computing credits for your final-year project training model. Sign as Sneha.
Write an email to the General Manager of StayIn Comfort Hotels, Mr. Kapoor, regarding missing amenities and noisy renovations during your stay. Sign as Akash.
Write an email to the Municipal Commissioner, Mr. Chatterjee, highlighting the critical issue of open potholes on the main market road. Sign as Vivek.
Write an email to the Library Head, Mrs. Swamy, requesting the purchase of digital subscriptions and latest technical textbooks for engineering students. Sign as Megha.
Write an email to the Placement Officer, Mr. Joseph, requesting a special re-schedule for an interview slot due to a university exam clash. Sign as Rohan.
Write an email to the Gym Manager, Mr. Gary, complaining about broken exercise equipment and an unhygienic locker area. Sign as Divya.
Write an email to the Event Coordinator, Ms. Alisha, seeking a full refund for a music festival ticket canceled last minute. Sign as Tarun.
Write an email to the Tech Support Head of CloudNet, Mr. Rao, demanding a configuration fix for recurring server timeouts on your production site. Sign as Preeti.
Write an email to the Society President, Mr. Joshi, complaining about illegal vehicle parking blocking access to emergency exits. Sign as Manish.
